name: Spanish Saffron Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken breast halves in a large Dutch oven coated with cooking spray until browned on medium heat.
2. Wipe the pan drippings from the Dutch oven using a paper towel.
3. Coat the Dutch oven again with Pam cooking spray and place it over medium-high heat until hot.
4. Add onion, garlic, and mushrooms to the hot Dutch oven; sauté until tender.
5. Add chicken, 1 cup of water, paprika, chicken bouillon powder, and saffron threads to the pot.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 25 minutes until the chicken is cooked through.
7. Remove the chicken from the Dutch oven and set aside.
8. Add peas, olives, and skim milk to the Dutch oven; cover and let simmer for 5 minutes.
9. Combine cornstarch with 2 tablespoons of water in a separate bowl.
10. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the vegetable mixture in the Dutch oven until it thickens and becomes bubbly.
11. To serve, place rice on a serving platter. Arrange the chicken over the rice and top with the vegetable mixture.
